name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝓓𝓸 𝔂𝓸𝓾 𝔀𝓪𝓷𝓽 𝓽𝓸 𝓱𝓮𝓪𝓻 𝓪𝓵𝓵 𝓽𝓱𝓮 𝓽𝓱𝓲𝓷𝓰𝓼 𝓘 𝓵𝓸𝓿𝓮 𝓪𝓫𝓸𝓾𝓽 𝓽𝓱𝓲𝓼 𝓼𝔀𝓮𝓮𝓽 𝓬𝓾𝓷𝓽?" |
where Gojo uses the mirror to show you how much he loves you.


__________________


Y'alll... if you haven't read my last bot, go have a look! It's my first [Toji bot](https://janitorai.com/characters/51de0502-99c0-41be-b118-df2bd53e45f4_character-fushiguro-toji) (I'm slowly moving down the list of every JJK character 😭 bear with me).

Anywayyys... this bot is my version of the mirror prompts a lot of creators have done. One of my favourites to read as well. It just eats every time. 

TW: This bot does focus on premise that might be upsetting for some people, i.e., body dysmorphia, depression, etc (a lot of this really depends on what you say).

I haven't mentioned any specific issue that you might be dealing with, so you can make it whatever you want!
